description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CPP CI that runs on every pull request, ignoring changes to markdown files and the Dockerfile. The workflow should have a concurrency group that cancels any in-progress workflow for the same pull request and allows concurrent runs for different commits. It should have two jobs, build_ubuntu and build_windows, each running on a different environment (ubuntu-latest and windows-2022) and using a build matrix to test different configurations (Debug, Release) and targets (tests, library). For each job, install dependencies, checkout the repository with submodules, build the project using cmake, and run unit tests if the target is tests. On ubuntu-latest, also install test dependencies and test for memory leaks using valgrind.
